title: camptouratea ilicifolia
intro: Camptouratea ilicifolia, also known as Camptotheca, is a flowering plant native to China, belonging to the family Nyssaceae. Its medicinal properties include the presence of camptothecin, a lignan alkaloid with anti-cancer and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Camptouratea ilicifolia include its potential to inhibit cancer cell growth and its anti-inflammatory effects, which may help in reducing pain and swelling. The herbal preparations of Camptouratea ilicifolia include extracts, capsules, and infusions, which can be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
